description:
# S8 Governance Fund Mission: Developer Advisory Board

**This is an optimistic approval. You should only cast a vote if you want to veto this proposal.** You can read more about this proposal type in our [operating manual](https://github.com/ethereum-optimism/OPerating-manual/blob/main/manual.md).

This proposal seeks to approve a mission funded by the Governance Fund:

**Developer Advisory Board**

**Goal:** Fund audits & technical missions to boost developer adoption.

**Budget:** 949k OP

You can read about the proposal in its entirety [here](https://gov.optimism.io/t/s8-governance-fund-missions/10004#p-44526-developer-advisory-board-mission-3).
title: S8 Governance Fund Mission: Developer Advisory Board
